markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review and refine Tavus's proposed content strategy and topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy needs a V2:** The initial strategy was a good starting point, but the nascent market requires a more precise, Tavus-specific approach to avoid generic terms and shed SEO baggage from past offerings.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=2963.0)
  - [**Competitor analysis requires an update:** The analysis must be revised to include D-ID.com, a key keyword competitor with high search visibility, and re-evaluate the relevance of Soul Machines.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [**Category creation is a top priority:** A core cluster will be dedicated to defining and owning a new term (e.g., "AI humans") to establish Tavus as the market leader.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=1827.0)
  - [**Verticals must be separated:** The proposed L\&D and Sales Enablement clusters will be split into distinct, programmatic verticals (L\&D, Martech, CX/CS) to better target specific user needs.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=2829.0)

## Topics

### Competitor Analysis & Gaps

  - [**Initial Analysis:** Reviewed HeyGen, Synthesia, Soul Machines, and Anam.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
      - [**HeyGen & Synthesia:** Large keyword footprints, but much is irrelevant (e.g., deepfakes). The opportunity is to own real-time conversational training, a gap they don't address.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
      - [**Soul Machines:** Small footprint, but its relevance is now questionable due to a "notice of receivership" on its site.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
      - [**Anam:** A direct head-to-head competitor with a small footprint, presenting an immediate opportunity to own the space.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
  - [**Required Revisions:**](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
      - [**Add D-ID.com:** A critical keyword competitor with high search visibility, despite Tavus's view of its product quality.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
      - [**Investigate HeyGen's LiveAvatar.com:** Analyze this separate domain's strategy to inform a plan for poaching its upcoming renewals.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
      - [**Refine content focus:** Avoid static video topics. Instead, create real-time equivalents of enterprise use cases (e.g., e-learning) that competitors own.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)

### Proposed Content Clusters & Feedback

  - [**Cluster 1: Conversational AI Infrastructure**](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
      - [**Goal:** Position Tavus as infrastructure, not a point solution.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=1324.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Good direction. Layer in key differentiators:](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
          - [**Emotional Intelligence (EQ):** A core model strength that distinguishes Tavus from text-only AI.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
          - [**Audio-Only Mode:** Use this existing feature as a low-friction entry point for users searching for voice-only AI.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
  - [**Cluster 2: Real-time Video Technology**](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Problematic. The term is too generic and conflicts with partners like Daily.co, diluting Tavus's focus.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [**Cluster 3: Category Creation (e.g., "Digital Humans")**](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=1827.0)
      - [**Goal:** Define and own a new term to establish long-term market leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=1848.0)
      - [**Feedback:** This is a top priority. The specific term is still undefined internally, but the cluster must be created.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=1827.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will research potential terms (e.g., "AI humans") with leadership input to find a balance between future vision and current search volume.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=2014.0)
  - [**Cluster 4 & 5: Verticals (L\&D, Sales Enablement, Recruitment, CX/CS)**](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=2581.0)
      - [**Feedback:** The clusters are \~70% correct but need restructuring.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=2829.0)
      - [**Action:** Split into distinct, programmatic verticals:](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=2829.0)
          - [**L\&D:** Focus on corporate training, language learning, and simulation.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=2581.0)
          - [**Martech:** Target RevOps, AI SDRs/BDRs, and sales agents.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=2866.0)
          - [**CX/CS:** Focus on customer service training and employee onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=2769.0)
  - [**General Feedback:**](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=3079.0)
      - [**"Proof" Content:** Prioritize case studies and programmatic use-case examples to educate the market on what's possible with real-time video.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=3079.0)
      - [**Messaging Clarity:** Be explicit to avoid confusion with past "text-to-video" offerings, which carry SEO baggage.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=2467.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX (William):**](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=3043.0)
      - [Revise the content strategy document to incorporate all feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=3190.0)
      - [Research potential category-creation terms (e.g., "AI humans") to balance future vision with current search volume.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=2014.0)
      - [Update the competitor analysis to include D-ID.com and investigate LiveAvatar.com.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
      - [Present the V2 strategy early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=3190.0)
  - [**Tavus (Colossus):**](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=3043.0)
      - [Provide specific topic suggestions for the new programmatic verticals (L\&D, Martech, CX/CS).](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=3043.0)
      - [Align with leadership on the preferred category-creation term.](https://fathom.video/share/X7yWTaymB-9cuEosSEJTFFgcxi9xgYnr?tab=summary&timestamp=2079.0)
